_comment: Growth-niche tape registry — feeds the Control Room clips page (bridge /leads) and clip_pipeline autopost. Tapes render via content_pipeline.py (growth_01_tapeN.txt). Update status here or via the site UI.

tapes.title: Part 1 — The Check-In
tapes.caption: part 1 — i took a break from reality to check back into it 🌅 #growth #deep #relate #minecraft #fyp

tapes.caption: part 2 — my first sunset at 20 years old 🌅 #growth #deep #relate #minecraft #fyp

tapes.caption: part 5 — you are a wave in an ocean of everyone who ever lived 🌊 #growth #deep #relate #minecraft #fyp
